label: cheque
text: I sold my old Activa to a neighbour for Rs 42,000. He took the scooter and gave a cheque which came back unpaid, account closed. He says he will pay in cash slowly, monthly.

label: cheque
text: A builder repaid my cancelled booking amount with three post dated cheques. The first one for Rs 2 lakhs has bounced. The remaining two are dated next month and I doubt they will clear.

label: cheque
text: My sister's ex husband was directed to pay maintenance and gave six post dated cheques. The second one bounced. Is a cheque bounce case possible in addition to the family court matter?

label: cheque
text: Humne apni gaadi bechi thi 5.5 lakh me. Aadha cash mila, aadhe ka cheque diya tha buyer ne. Cheque do baar bounce ho chuka hai. Gaadi bhi le gaya, paise bhi nahi de raha. Bahut pareshan hoon.

label: cheque
text: My friend's wife took gold jewellery from my mother to pawn for an emergency and gave a cheque of Rs 2.6 lakhs as assurance. The jewellery is not returned and the cheque has bounced.

label: cheque
text: The insurance surveyor settled my claim partly in cash and the balance through the garage owner who gave me his cheque of Rs 40,000. That cheque bounced. The garage owner says the insurer has not released his money.

label: cheque
text: My father supplied bricks to a contractor for years. The last outstanding was settled with two cheques of Rs 1 lakh each. Both bounced on the same day. The contractor's site is now shut.

label: cheque
text: Bhai ne business ke liye 3 lakh liye the, stamp paper pe likha ke aur cheque de ke. Cheque bounce ho gaya, ab bolta hai ghar ka mamla hai court mat jao. Mujhe paise wapas chahiye bas.

label: cheque
text: I am a retired teacher. A former colleague borrowed Rs 4 lakhs from my retirement fund promising interest, and gave post dated cheques. The first two bounced. My family does not know about the loan yet.

label: cheque
text: Our school's fee refund cheque to me for double payment, Rs 34,000, bounced twice. The accountant says the trust signatory changed and all old cheques are invalid, but they do not issue a new one.

label: cheque
text: I financed my nephew's shop stock of Rs 2.5 lakhs against a cheque. It bounced. Family elders say settle at half. The notice deadline is approaching and I cannot decide whether to file or settle.

label: cheque
text: My car accident compensation was partly paid by the other party privately through a cheque of Rs 1.5 lakhs to avoid police involvement. The cheque bounced and now he denies the accident entirely.

label: consumer
text: I paid Rs 45,000 to a furniture shop in Pune for a sofa set. They delivered a different colour and now they are not answering my calls.

label: consumer
text: My new laptop stopped charging within two weeks. The brand service centre says the motherboard is damaged due to my fault and is demanding Rs 22,000 for repair even though it is under warranty.

label: consumer
text: The courier company lost a parcel containing handmade sarees worth Rs 25,000 that I sent to my sister. They are offering only Rs 2,000 as per their terms.

label: consumer
text: We booked a flat in a project in Noida in 2021 and paid forty lakhs so far. The builder promised possession in 2023 and there is still no sign of completion. He keeps asking for more instalments.

label: consumer
text: An electrician from an app based service damaged my ceiling fan and the wall while installing it. The company says technicians are independent partners and they are not responsible.

label: consumer
text: Shaadi ke liye photographer book kiya tha 80,000 me. Aadhi photos blur hain aur video ab tak nahi mila, chaar mahine ho gaye. Wo bolta hai editing chal rahi hai.

label: consumer
text: Mobile recharge kiya 599 ka, balance nahi aaya. Customer care wale bolte hain 24 ghante me aa jayega, ab teen din ho gaye. Company complaint band kar deti hai bina solve kiye.

label: consumer
text: A dermatologist clinic sold me a laser treatment package of eight sittings for Rs 40,000. After three sittings they shifted the clinic to another city and will not refund the remaining sittings.

label: consumer
text: I booked a banquet hall for my son's wedding with Rs 1 lakh advance. They double booked the date and cancelled on us three weeks before, and now say the advance is non refundable.

label: consumer
text: I run a small photocopy shop and bought a heavy duty printer for it. It has a paper feed defect from day one and the seller says business purchases have no return policy at all.

label: consumer
text: I gave an advance of Rs 10,000 for a modular kitchen quote. The company inflated the final quote by 60 percent over the agreed estimate and refuses to return the advance if I do not proceed.

label: consumer
text: Our wedding caterer served 150 plates when we had paid for 250. Guests went hungry and he still billed the full amount, threatening to keep the security advance if we deduct anything.

label: other
text: The company I worked at for six years is refusing to pay my gratuity, saying I resigned instead of retiring. My HR friend says gratuity applies after five years regardless. Who is right?

label: other
text: My PF has not been deposited by my employer for over a year even though it is deducted from my salary every month. The EPFO portal shows no credits after March last year.

label: other
text: My wife's brother borrowed our fixed deposit receipts saying he needed them to show as security for one week. He has pledged them for his own loan and the bank refuses to release them.

label: other
text: My grandfather's land records show my late father's name misspelled, and now the revenue office refuses mutation in our names until the ancient spelling error is corrected through court.

label: other
text: There is a dispute in our family and it has become very ugly. Everyone has said things and done things. I do not even know where to start explaining. Can a lawyer just listen to everything first?

label: other
text: I want to take legal action against a person who wronged my family very badly. I cannot write the details here. Please tell me the process to start and how much a lawyer costs.

label: other
text: My octogenarian mother signed papers she cannot read, brought by my brother, and now her house is in his name. She thought she was signing pension forms. She cries every day.

label: other
text: There was a fight near our house and I gave police a statement as a witness. Now the accused's family threatens my father daily to make me change my statement. Local police are not taking it seriously.

label: other
text: Humare mohalle me ek aadmi sabko paise dekar plot ke kagaz banwa raha hai jo sarkari zameen hai. Humne complaint ki to hume hi dhamkaya ja raha hai. Kahan shikayat karein ki kaam ho?

label: other
text: I am an artist and a big brand used my painting on their festive packaging without permission. Their legal team replied to my email saying the artwork was sourced from a vendor and I should chase the vendor.

label: other
text: An online gaming app froze my winnings of Rs 1.9 lakhs during withdrawal, citing suspicious activity, but keeps my deposits and continues sending me offers to play more.

label: other
text: Sir I have a problem going on since a long time and nobody is helping me solve it. I have visited many offices. I just want justice for what happened to us. Tell me whom to meet.

label: tenancy
text: My rent agreement expired last month. The landlord refuses to renew it but also refuses to return the deposit, saying I should continue month to month. I want the security of a written agreement.

label: tenancy
text: I run a tiffin service from my rented kitchen with the landlord's verbal permission from three years ago. Now he suddenly objects and threatens eviction for commercial use, demanding double rent to continue.

label: tenancy
text: After I complained about the broken staircase railing, the landlord stopped accepting my rent transfers so he can claim non payment. My last two transfers were returned.

label: tenancy
text: My office rented a floor in a commercial building. The owner has leased the parking we pay for to a car dealership. Our clients have nowhere to park and he refuses to reduce rent.

label: tenancy
text: Our landlord passed away and his three sons are each separately demanding rent from us, threatening eviction if we pay the others. We do not know who legally owns the house now.

label: tenancy
text: The broker and landlord together took one month brokerage and one month advance rent, then gave the flat to someone else who paid more. Both are ignoring my calls now. I have the payment receipts.

label: tenancy
text: A family friend let us stay in his flat on a verbal arrangement for rent for six years. After his death, his children call us trespassers and have cut the water line. We have paid rent by cheque throughout.

label: tenancy
text: The house owner promised to register the rent agreement and kept both copies for that purpose. A year later there is no registration, he holds both originals, and he now disputes the agreed rent amount.

label: tenancy
text: The landlord cut off the kitchen gas pipeline connection shared from his floor because we refused to pay a new gas charge he invented last month. The agreement includes gas in the rent.

label: tenancy
text: I rent agricultural land for vegetable farming on yearly renewal. After I improved the soil and installed drip lines at my cost, the owner refuses renewal and will not compensate for the improvements.

label: tenancy
text: The landlord accepted rent from me for two years, and now claims I am not a tenant but a caretaker because the agreement was never renewed in writing, and caretakers can be removed anytime.

label: tenancy
text: My tenant demands I pay him Rs 2 lakhs to vacate, calling it his tenancy right money. There is no such clause anywhere. He has stopped paying rent and says the money will come out of what he owes anyway.
